name: intent-quality
description: Codex plugin for local-first Agent collaboration quality checks, intent diagnosis, evals, and confirmation-gated learning.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose and test Agent collaboration quality locally.
interface.longDescription: Intent Quality helps Codex users preserve user intent, check authorization boundaries, detect stale context, validate premises, run collaboration-quality evals, and keep learning confirmation-gated.
defaultPrompt: Use $intent-quality to check this repo before changing files.
Use $intent-quality to diagnose why this Agent task went wrong.
Use $intent-quality to turn this failure into a local eval.
